product.name: ArGiyim 245
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra Durable, Ultra Breathable Front Side Polyester Back Side Cotton, PolyCotton Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 80% Polyester 20% Cotton PolyCotton High Visible Water Repellent Twill Fabric
product.specLine: 245 g/m², 80% Polyester 20% Cotton High Visible, Chemical Resistant, 3/1 S Twill Woven Fabric
descriptions: 80% Polyester 20% Cotton Polycotton high visible, chemical resistant twill fabric. The front side of the fabric is 100% Polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim²45 are used for outdoor jackets, safety jackets, pans and trousers.
Certified for EN ISO 20471 and for EN 13034
80% Polyester 20% Cotton PolyCotton High Visible Water Repellent Twill Fabric
245 g/m², 80% Polyester 20% Cotton High Visible, Chemical Resistant, 3/1 S Twill Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 1800N ; Weft > 600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 30N ; Weft > 25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: descriptions: 'Certified for EN ISO 20471 and for EN 13034'
titleDescriptor: High Visible Water Repellent Twill Fabric
matches.rationale: Explicit certification to EN ISO 20471 and hi-vis property with product described as high-visible fabric for safety jackets.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Chemical resistant and FR properties could relate to industrial hazards but no explicit welding/metallurgy use stated.
Antistatic and EMI shielding properties present, but no explicit electrical utility or high-voltage application stated.
No explicit military, police or uniformed-service use stated despite durable workwear framing.
